title: CanvasStorm MVP-first 重构
objective: 把 CanvasStorm 从混合功能图原型推进为可验证的 MVP-first 功能发散工具，并按 PR 阶段记录百分比和证据。

tasks.title: 状态和规划收口
tasks.acceptance: Goal 文档、PR 计划、交接状态和项目 adapter 已落地；xixi goal 可显示百分比；工作区可提交。

evidence.value: PR0 evidence: goal lint pass; xixi-dev-system doctor pass; npm test pass (HTML ok, API 52 passed, WebSocket 12 passed, frontend 129 passed); files created/updated: GOAL_MVP_FIRST_REFACTOR.md, PR_PLAN.md, CURRENT_STATUS.md, HANDOFF.md, .xixi-dev-system.json, .xds/goals/canvasstorm-mvp-first-refactor.json.

tasks.title: 预览和分支卫生收口
tasks.acceptance: 现有预览 PR 和本地超前提交状态明确；需要上传或关闭的分支处理完毕；主开发分支状态清楚。

evidence.value: PR1 evidence: PR #4 merged into cx/direction-workbench-ci at merge commit 7f432c5; Realtime preview CI verify checks completed successfully twice; cx/realtime-preview-v1 local ahead commit pushed and branch became mergeable before merge. URL: https://github.com/xixinikl/canvas-storm/pull/4

tasks.title: MVP-first 数据模型
tasks.acceptance: 项目结构支持 MVP 主线、发散方向、方向节点和决策记录；旧项目可兼容打开；测试覆盖新旧结构。

evidence.value: PR2 evidence: implemented schemaVersion 2 with mvp, directions, decisions, and node roles; legacy node-only projects migrate on login; npm test passed (HTML ok, API 52 passed, WebSocket 12 passed, frontend 143 passed).

tasks.title: AI 和 fallback 输出契约
tasks.acceptance: AI prompt、接口解析和本地降级均产出 MVP-first 结构；异常输出有容错；相关 API/前端测试通过。

evidence.value: PR3 evidence: AI root generation now requests/accepts {mvp,directions}; child generation requests/accepts {children}; legacy array responses remain compatible; fallbackGenerate emits the same structured contract; npm test passed (HTML ok, API 52 passed, WebSocket 12 passed, frontend 150 passed).

tasks.title: 首屏信息架构
tasks.acceptance: 首屏清楚展示项目想法、核心 MVP 和方向选择；主操作唯一；桌面和移动端无明显信息拥挤。

evidence.value: PR4 evidence: first screen now renders MVP overview plus direction rail; frontend assertions verify core MVP/directions and direction click; npm test passed (HTML ok, API 52 passed, WebSocket 12 passed, frontend 156 passed); browser screenshots verified desktop and mobile with no horizontal overflow: output/playwright/desktop-mvp-first-pr4.png, output/playwright/mobile-mvp-first-pr4-fixed.png.

tasks.title: 方向画布和交互语义
tasks.acceptance: 选择方向、补充当前层、进入下一层三个行为语义清楚；画布中心想法可见，子节点不重叠。

evidence.value: PR5 方向画布和交互语义完成：npm test 通过（API 52、WS 12、前端 162）；Playwright 桌面/手机验证 direction/child 语义、无横向溢出、手机推荐节点不被命令条遮挡；截图 output/playwright/pr5-direction-semantics-desktop.png、pr5-child-layer-semantics-desktop.png、pr5-direction-semantics-mobile.png、pr5-child-layer-semantics-mobile.png

tasks.title: 持久化、导出和测试补强
tasks.acceptance: 用户项目保存/恢复、灵感备选库、以后再看和导出均适配新结构；npm test 通过。

evidence.value: PR6 持久化、导出和测试补强完成：npm test 通过（API 56、WS 12、前端 167）；前端测试覆盖 MVP 保存不覆盖 AI 目标、Markdown 导出核心 MVP/发散方向；API 测试覆盖 mvp/directions/decisions 保存读取；Playwright 浏览器验证刷新后 MVP、directions、ideaPool 保留，Markdown 包含核心 MVP、发散方向、灵感备选库。

tasks.title: 浏览器验收和合并准备
tasks.acceptance: 桌面/移动端真实路径走通；PR 描述、测试证据、已知边界和合并建议齐全。

evidence.value: PR7 浏览器验收和合并准备完成：已合并 origin/main 并解决 .xixi-dev-system.json/README.md 冲突；npm test 通过（API 56、WS 12、前端 167）；Playwright 最终桌面/手机主路径通过并生成 pr7-final-* 截图；quality report 本地通过 5/5 且包含 npm test；PR 描述准备更新为 100%。
